artifact.description: HALOS Provenance Spec v0.2 — graph model with decision provenance, interaction semantics, and policy evaluation traces

ai_assistance.description: Drafted initial graph model schema with entities, activities, and relationships aligned to W3C PROV concepts
Compared W3C PROV relationship types and recommended a subset for HALOS, plus simpler aliases for readability
Drafted eight domain examples (enterprise, journalism, education, government, music, nonprofit, realtime-critical, scientific) with full graph provenance records and collaboration narratives

notes: Retroactively created from git history (commits 777db0e through 88ca7c8). Details are best-effort reconstruction. v0.2 was a major expansion: the graph model (entities, activities, relationships) aligned with W3C PROV, decision provenance as a first-class concept, human-AI interaction semantics (accepted/modified/rejected), policy evaluation traces, taskType and techniques fields, and eight domain examples spanning enterprise software to humanitarian aid.
